name: Charan Lakkaraju
bio: Sri Charan Lakkaraju is the Founder and CEO of Student Tribe, a platform dedicated to empowering students with access to opportunities, skills, and meaningful networks. A Forbes 30 Under 30 Asia (2018), he has trained over 300,000 students in entrepreneurship, and career readiness.

name: Kaushik NC
bio: Kaushik NC is a Telugu sports broadcaster, presenter, and storyteller. He is known for hosting pre- and post-match shows, interviewing cricketers, and bringing iconic sporting moments to life for millions of fans. Kaushik has voiced Virat Kohli's 71st international century, his 49th and 50th ODI centuries, the India vs Pakistan T20 World Cup 2022 clash, and the Olympics 2024.

name: Kireeti Damaraju
bio: Kireeti Damaraju is an Indian actor who works in Telugu cinema. He trained in acting through theatre before venturing into films and transitioned from an engineering background into film and media.

name: Poorna Malavath
bio: Exploring the profound impact of storytelling and culture on our collective identity and the world we create.

name: Speaker TBA
bio: Dedicated to creating meaningful social change and exploring the ripples of impact that ideas can have on communities.

name: Speaker TBA
bio: At the cutting edge of scientific discovery, pushing the boundaries of what we know about the universe and ourselves.

name: Speaker TBA
bio: Focused on sustainable solutions and building a future where technology and nature coexist in harmony.

name: Dr. Aarav Patel
topic: The Quantum Leap: Solving the Unsolvable
bio: Dr. Aarav Patel is a leading researcher in quantum algorithms. His work focuses on practical applications of quantum computing in cryptography and complex system simulation.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya Sharma founded GreenSynth to bridge the gap between technological advancement and environmental sustainability. She advocates for eco-conscious software engineering.

name: Rohan Deshmukh
topic: AI and the Art of Human Connection
bio: Rohan Deshmukh explores the intersection of artificial intelligence and human behavior. His latest projects involve developing empathetic AI systems for mental health support.

name: Ananya Gupta
topic: Designing for the Next Billion Users
bio: Ananya Gupta advocates for inclusive design. She shares insights on creating user interfaces that are accessible, resilient, and engaging for diverse global populations.

name: Vikram Singh
bio: With over a decade of experience in cybersecurity, Vikram Singh discusses emerging threats in the edge computing era and proactive strategies for data protection.

name: Neha Reddy
topic: Mars and Beyond: The New Space Race
bio: Neha Reddy is an aerospace engineer working on propulsion systems for deep space travel. She shares her vision of humanity as a multi-planetary species.
